feed.title: sakkamade
feed.subtitle: through life with yuri in heart

entry.title: Episode 40. Apricot・Return.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Prico was vacantly sitting at the library service counter. Her work was already done, so she has nothing to do. Someone has tread their soles through the floor, but it was said to not repair it. Prico wished to take off her maid outfit, and take a playful sexy poses. However quickly lose her interest, for no one to see it. Reluctantly, Prico put on the maid clothes, which she had taken off, again. A considerable amount of time has elapsed since Yuuyami and Rapha went out. The daylight has changed the night, the sun ascend in the morning. However no one returned yet.

entry.title: Episode 39. For the First Time…

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Yuuyami placed Lydia, who she was holding, down, removed her maid outfit, and laid it out upon the ground. Lydia took off her boots, sat upon her maid outfit, and tried to undress.

entry.title: Episode 38. Right After the First Quarrel..?

link.title: Episode 38. Right After the First Quarrel..?

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: By the time Ohan was repaired, the sun had set utterly. Incidentally, Ohan could not return to the lodge, for basement doorway being too narrow, so he destroyed the floor, that Yuuyami had penetrate, even farther, and only thereafter made his way to the room. Then​, in order to withdraw to his usual guard duty, he tried to pass outside, however the entrance of lodge was likewise too narrow to allow him go. Upon the time Yuuyami brought him inside, Ohan’s body was divided into parts.

entry.title: Episode 37. I Want to Have a Sexual Intercourse!

link.title: Episode 37. I Want to Have a Sexual Intercourse!

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Hinagiku comforted convulsively sobbing Rapha. In a meanwhile, Yuuyami proceed a self-check. Apparently, my condition is different from usual. Not a distinct​ defect, it is worth, however, keeping in mind. Lydia is standing next to Yuuyami, observing the situation. Hmm, Yuuyami begin to recognise her own condition. There is a load upon the quantum brain, and the temperature within my body is heightened. However, such cannot be described as an intense heat generation​. To express it humanly, it is as being affected by slight fever. Origin of the load was immediately cleared by Yuuyami. The emotions. The great affection towards Lydia is the origin. Yuuyami was able to handle emotions well, up to certain extent, however not completely. Albeit, I didn’t shut down, and the processing performance improved significantly, in comparison to the previous time. Such is no exaggeration to say - I has grown.

entry.title: Episode 36. Unparalleled Yuuyami.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Hinagiku pointed the muzzle at Lydia. However, Lydia was convinced: Hinagiku would not shoot. Hinagiku is person who doesn’t understand her own words and actions​―such as confining Lydia―but notwithstanding​ that, Lydia felt that she wouldn’t shoot. Hinagiku, perhaps, actually desire to shoot herself, not Lydia. However, Hinagiku did not really wish to die, believed Lydia. It appeared that she experienced various sorrows, various painful events, she, thereby, entrusted herself to some kind of despair. Hinagiku surely has a delicate heart. And then, Yuuyami enter through the door. For Lydia somehow sort of felt such being the case, she wasn’t too surprised. Nevertheless, was glad to see her arriving much sooner than expected.

entry.title: Episode 35. Mild Heartburn from Love Narrative.

link.title: Episode 35. Mild Heartburn from Love Narrative.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Upon the moment Rapha arrived to the Woodland, she began vomiting. Yuuyami sighed, whereas stroking Rapha’s back.

entry.title: Episode 34. Angel・X・Machine.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: That room had no light. It didn’t feel dark, however, for numerous​ glowing monitors.

entry.title: Episode 33. When Mother is Pervert and Lunatic.

link.title: Episode 33. When Mother is Pervert and Lunatic.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Noah found esplanade​, finished mapping it, and now was waiting for Lydia and Ohan at the designated spot nigh the Woodland. It was around noon.

entry.title: Episode 32. Confined Lydia.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lady, who invited Lydia to the lodge, introduced herself as Hinagiku. At present, Lydia sitting upon one-person sofa. For Hinagiku said, ‘I’ll fetch a drink,’ she withdrew to within the house. Incidentally, Ohan awaiting outside. Lydia restlessly peered over the lodge. Lodge is very simple and frugal. There were bare minimum, necessary for life. That is: sofa, table, and bed. Along with, probably, a simple Food Maker and Recycling Box, which placed within depth of the dwelling, speculated Lydia. Lodge ceiling is awfully tall, and, being Ohan to get through the entrance, he would be able rise inside. Upon Lydia swam her gaze to the table, she found an emerald green sphere locked up in the vial​. Lydia tilted her head. What is this-? For her never seen before such kind of object, Lydia gathered the tablet from her backpack, which placed upon the floor, took a picture of vial with its camera, and searched it up. The hit was a cultivation method of growing moss, denoted as terrarium.

entry.title: Episode 31. Knock on the Door.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Upon validation the outside world being destroyed, LM series Type・Ⅱ activated the private power generator, whereafter resumed indifferently doing her regular duty. She is an Autodoll, and is has no qualia. Accordingly, even if the world is vanished, she will feel nothing. Lady merely bore an information apropos of world’s doom. No emotions had keep it a company. She organised the books, burnished the floor, and polished the walls. Also, lady was reviewing various equipment, making a phone calls to the readers who did not return the book even post due date. Surely, no one answered. Lady had been doing so, continuously, for years. She monitored the weather every day, in case for readers to visit. Such is to welcome visitors with a smile, saying: “The weather is nice today, isn’t it.”
